diagrams.title: Dynamic Array Growth Timeline
diagrams.description: Shows how capacity grows as elements are inserted into a dynamic array
elements: Wasted space shown as unused slots
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how capacity doubles and understand memory waste patterns

diagrams.title: Array Resize Operation
diagrams.description: Step-by-step process of copying elements during array doubling
diagrams.purpose: Understand the O(n) resize operation that occurs occasionally

diagrams.title: Contiguous vs Fragmented Memory
diagrams.description: Comparison of memory layout in contiguous array vs linked structure
elements: Linked: node1 at addr100 → node2 at addr500 → node3 at addr200
Cache line shows 4 array elements loaded together
Pointer traversal requires separate memory access each time
diagrams.purpose: Understand why contiguous arrays have better cache performance
